tasks.title: Validate canonical bundle structure
tasks.completion_predicate: All required bundle entries exist, parse successfully, and refer only to frozen-source or declared asset paths.

tasks.title: Resolve every inline anchor
tasks.completion_predicate: Every inline anchor in paper.md resolves exactly once through anchors.json with valid provenance and zero unresolved anchors.

tasks.title: Verify headings and sampled text
tasks.completion_predicate: Heading completeness and representative text-overlap checks cover the paper and record their sampling rationale and findings.

tasks.title: Verify equations tables and figures
tasks.completion_predicate: Representative equations, theorems, tables, figures, captions, citations, and assets are checked against the PDF with discrepancies classified.

tasks.title: Audit uncertainty and suspicious content
tasks.completion_predicate: Low-confidence regions and suspicious instruction-like passages are anchored, preserved, and accurately reflected in extraction findings.

tasks.title: Publish parse verification gate
tasks.completion_predicate: A validated parse-verification-report.json identifies the verified bundle, records all checks and limitations, reports zero unresolved anchors, and has passed status.
